mapper.insert:
insert into fin_kline_snapshot( asset_id, trade_date, provider_code, open_price, close_price, high_price, low_price, volume, turnover_amount, amplitude, change_rate, change_amount, turnover_rate, raw_payload, create_time ) values
( #{item.assetId}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.providerCode}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.volume}, #{item.turnoverAmount}, #{item.amplitude}, #{item.changeRate}, #{item.changeAmount}, #{item.turnoverRate}, #{item.rawPayload}, sysdate() )
on duplicate key update provider_code = values(provider_code), open_price = values(open_price), close_price = values(close_price), high_price = values(high_price), low_price = values(low_price), volume = values(volume), turnover_amount = values(turnover_amount), amplitude = values(amplitude), change_rate = values(change_rate), change_amount = values(change_amount), turnover_rate = values(turnover_rate), raw_payload = values(raw_payload)
mapper.select: select k.kline_id, k.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, k.trade_date, k.open_price, k.close_price, k.high_price, k.low_price, k.volume, k.turnover_amount, k.amplitude, k.change_rate, k.change_amount, k.turnover_rate, k.provider_code, k.raw_payload from fin_kline_snapshot k left join fin_asset a on a.asset_id = k.asset_id where k.asset_id = #{assetId} order by k.trade_date desc limit #{limit}
select max(trade_date) from fin_kline_snapshot where asset_id = #{assetId}
